programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes get caught up in trouble caused by a group of mischievous Squirtle.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash and friends meet a Pokémon researcher who wants to see a unique Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash challenges Gym Leader Lt. Surge, but Pikachu's opponent is a strong Raichu.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Team Rocket lures Ash and friends onto a cruise ship to steal their Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes are forced to work with Team Rocket in order to survive a shipwreck.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Pikachu and the other Pokémon get separated from their Trainers on an island.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: A group of wild Tentacool disrupt the development of a resort hotel.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: In a seaside town, a terrifying ghost story comes to life for Brock and James.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash has a tough decision to make after encountering a group of wild Butterfree.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Aiming for his fourth badge, Ash challenges Saffron City Gym Leader Sabrina.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: After losing to Sabrina, Ash visits Lavender Town to catch a Ghost-type Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Leaving Lavender Town with a Haunter in tow, Ash sets his sights on a rematch.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: When Ash tries to catch a wild Mankey, it loses its cool and steals his hat.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash gets kicked out of the Celadon City Gym as he's about to challenge Erika.

programme.title: Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Grace (Selena Gomez) is an ordinary girl who becomes an accidental princess when a family summer trip to Paris turns into the fantasy of a lifetime. Living like royalty, Grace, along with her two best friends, discovers who she really is – by assuming another person's identity.

programme.title: Life or Something Like It
programme.desc: The perfect world of a beautiful Seattle television reporter is shattered by the prediction of her death in seven days.

programme.title: Big Momma's House 2
programme.desc: Undercover Agent Malcolm Turner is back and this time he's out to expose the suspected designer of a deadly computer "worm" that would allow outside forces access to sophistical and critical government intelligence files.

programme.title: Big Mommas: Like Father, Like Son
programme.desc: Big Momma is back — and this time he has big backup: his teenage stepson Trent (Brendan T. Jackson). Martin Lawrence returns as FBI agent Malcolm Turner and as Turner's deep-cover alter-ego Big Momma.

programme.title: A Gift for Christmas
programme.desc: Darcy Archer is a romantic, she dreams of being swept off her feet by the perfect man. Instead, she accidentally crashes into a handsome, sharply dressed stranger walking his dog. He is knocked unconscious and taken to hospital, leaving his puppy and a mysterious Christmas gift behind.

programme.title: Holiday Joy
programme.desc: Joy Hockstatter has been trying to help her Dad, Bob, hold the family together after her Mother's death a few years earlier.

programme.title: Looks Like Christmas
programme.desc: From cooking to decorating, Carol sleeps and breathes Christmas, so it's no wonder the town refers to her as “Christmas Carol” but when a handsome man comes to town and challenges her traditional holiday views, Carol must learn how to compromise even if it means facing an unexpected romance.

programme.title: The Family Man
programme.desc: Investment broker, Jack (Nicolas Cage), finds his fast-lane lifestyle turned upside down when he wakes up in an alternate suburban universe where his sports car and girlfriend have become a mini-van and wife. He soon finds himself at a crossroad between his high-power career and the woman he loves.

programme.title: Christmas in the Wilds
programme.desc: Buck and Jessica's merry little Christmas together takes a dangerous turn when their journey through the wild turns into a battle for survival.

programme.title: Burden Of Evil
programme.desc: (2012) Thriller with Michael Ironside. After the abduction of a senator's daughter, Detective Caitlyn Conner is called in to help. But it turns personal, as the same psychopath murdered her husband.

programme.title: Two Wrongs
programme.desc: A single mother must do the unthinkable to find her abducted daughter. Starring Gillian Zinser (2015)

programme.title: Run To Me
programme.desc: An amateur triathlete falls under the spell of a controversial trainer who utilizes experimental hypnotherapy. Starring Claire Forlani (2016)

programme.title: Early Release
programme.desc: A suburban mother must protect her family from her former prison cellmate. Starring Kelli Williams (2017)

programme.title: Brace For Impact
programme.desc: (2016) Drama with Kerry Condon. A disgraced Flight Crash Investigator uncovers a conspiracy while probing her brother's mysterious plane crash. Can she race to uncover the truth?

programme.title: Genius
programme.desc: Nicole Kidman and Colin Firth star in this stirring drama about the friendship between Thomas Wolfe and editor Maxwell Perkins (who discovered F. Scott Fitzgerald and Ernest Hemingway).

programme.title: Playing for Keeps
programme.desc: Playing For Keeps is a romantic comedy about a former soccer star who returns home to put his life back together. Looking for a way to rebuild his relationship with his son, he gets roped into coaching the boy's soccer team.

programme.title: Killers
programme.desc: Spencer Aimes is just your average, undercover, super-assassin accustomed to a life of flashy sports cars and even flashier women. But when he meets Jen Kornfeldt, a fun-loving computer tech, he finds true love… and happily trades international intrigue for domestic bliss.

programme.title: Guardians of the Tomb
programme.desc: An innocent discovery of a well-preserved mummified Emperor from 200 B.C. China unearths a two thousand-year-old nightmare, a secret that should have remained buried.

programme.title: A Puppy for Christmas
programme.desc: After adopting a cute puppy, Noelle's world is turned upside down when her boyfriend breaks up with her. After accepting an invitation to spend the holidays with a co-worker, she is surrounded by the Christmas cheer of a happy family and soon sparks begin to fly.

programme.title: Northpole
programme.desc: When a loss of togetherness spreads across the globe and threatens the existence of Santa's Northpole, a little boy named Kevin is called upon to save the day.

programme.title: Karen Kingsbury's The Bridge
programme.desc: Two new students at nearby Belmont University, Ryan and Molly, meet the first day of classes and become study partners. The Bridge, a local bookstore, becomes a close part of their lives as their relationship grows.

programme.title: My Dad is Scrooge
programme.desc: The animals of Woodsley's Farm help Oliver and his little sister June stage the classic tale of A Christmas Carol to shock their Dad into embracing the spirit of the holidays.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: A teenage boy's incredible werewolf powers improve the quality of his life in dramatic and hilarious ways.

programme.title: Three Amigos!
programme.desc: Steve Martin, Chevy Chase and Martin Short are three wild and crazy caballeros in this comedy adventure that's a fiesta of fun. Co-starring Phil Hartman and Jon Lovitz, the '¡Three Amigos!' blaze a side-splitting trail across the comedy frontier!

programme.title: Runaway Jury
programme.desc: In this suspenseful thriller, a high-priced and ruthless jury "consultant" will stop at nothing to secure a verdict on an explosive trial.

programme.title: Of Mice and Men
programme.desc: John Malkovich, Gary Sinise and Sherilyn Fenn shine in this contemporary remake of the beloved classic about a nomadic farm worker who looks after his dimwitted, gentle-giant friend.

programme.title: The Legend of Hercules
programme.desc: Banished by the king, Hercules harnesses his powers and gathers an army to fight his way back to his kingdom.

programme.title: Conan the Barbarian
programme.desc: The legendary Cimmerian warrior, Conan, fights an epic battle against hulking rivals, horrific monsters, and impossible odds, as he realizes he is the only one who can save the great nations of Hyboria from an encroaching reign of supernatural evil.

programme.title: Dirty Dancing
programme.desc: The timeless love story reimagined for a new generation of fans.

programme.title: La La Land
programme.desc: A pianist and an actress fall in love in Los Angeles while attempting to reconcile their aspirations.

programme.title: A Christmas Dream
programme.desc: Headstrong New Yorker, Ashley, reluctantly agrees to spend Christmas in Italy with her mother in an effort to sell her grandparents' ranch. However, over time she finds herself growing attached to the beautiful countryside, and upon meeting one of the potential investors, realises that love and legacy could bring the old family home together again.

programme.title: My Dad's Christmas Date
programme.desc: It's Christmas in the charming city of York, and after the death of her mother, teenager Jules knows all she and her dad, David, really need for Christmas is love. With both struggling to cope with everyday life in the shadow of their loss, Jules, inspired by happy memories of her mum, decides to take matters into her own hands. Creating profiles for David on multiple online dating platforms without his knowledge, Jules sets out to find her dad a girlfriend and, for herself, someone with whom she can talk. But finding love is easier said than done as Jules discovers, when her plans begin to unravel with hilarious and unexpected consequences. A uniquely heartfelt festive rom-com, starring Jermey Piven (Serendipity, Entourage) and Joely Richardson (101 Dalmatians, The Patriot).

programme.title: Christmas With a Crown
programme.desc: When a successful woman returns to her hometown to revive her family's Christmas festival, she meets a dashing stranger who's volunteered to help organise the event. Sparks begin to fly between them, but little does she know that he's really a prince in disguise, longing to find the true spirit of the holidays! It will take a Christmas miracle of royal proportions for their hearts to meet as one.

programme.title: Santa Stole Our Dog
programme.desc: A magical holiday adventure featuring original Christmas songs by Dolly Parton, and starring Golden Globe winner, Ed Asner (Elf, Up). The Whitehaven family embark on a whirlwind adventure to the North Pole when their beloved dog, Rusty, goes missing on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: A Mother's Fury
programme.desc: A gripping, tender and thought-provoking thriller written by and starring Siobhan Fallon Hogan (Men in Black) and Robert Patrick (DC's Peacemaker). When a young college student is killed in a fraternity hazing incident, his mother resorts to extreme measures by taking justice into her own hands when she encounters empty promises in Washington, D.C. Directed by Vibeke Muasya (Twisted).

programme.title: Barely Lethal
programme.desc: Teenager Megan Walsh (Hailee Steinfeld, Enders Game) is a special ops agent who yearns for a normal adolescence. After faking her own death she assumes the role of an exchange student at a typical American high school, only to find that surviving here is harder than international espionage! Jam-packed with hilarious performances from Samuel L. Jackson, Jessica Alba and Sophie Turner.

programme.title: Breaking Habits
programme.desc: An outrageous, not-to-be-missed documentary about a Sisterhood of gun-slinging nuns who live and work in a modern day Wild West. From the team behind Gascoigne and McQueen, this unbelievable film follows corporate exec-turned-weed-farmer Sister Kate who, after being betrayed by a bigamist husband, fled penniless and discovered the lucrative business of medicinal cannabis farming.

programme.title: Legacy of Lies
programme.desc: High stakes espionage takes the fight to the streets. Martin Baxter (Scott Adkins, Doctor Strange) a disgraced MI6 agent is forced back into the spy game as a young journalist seeks out his help to expose the shocking truth about operations conducted by the Russian Secret Service. With his daughter pulled into the fray will Martin choose family over queen and country in this explosive thriller?

programme.title: Charlie Says
programme.desc: From the director of American Psycho, this is the shocking and infamous story of Charlie Manson and his manipulation tactics on the members of his cult. With remarkable cinematography and a disturbingly stand-out performance by Matt Smith, Charlie Says showcases one of the most notorious serial killers in history. Also starring Game of Thrones Hannah Murray, Suki Waterhouse and Chase Crawford.

programme.title: Fashionably In Love
programme.desc: New York playboy Oliver needs to clear up his image by dating Avery a respectable socialite. Will this unluckily pairing turn into anything more? (2022)

programme.title: Inspiring Love
programme.desc: After a misunderstanding shy artist Isla and confident salesman Mark team up to create a sculpture for Mark's his boss. As Isla spends more time with Mark, will his confidence rub off? (2022)

programme.title: Key to Love
programme.desc: A bookstore owner starts an antagonistic relationship with a book cover model until an antique key found in a false book unlocks their romance. Starring Corey Sevier (2023)

programme.title: Flowers and Honey
programme.desc: Sparks fly between a city florist and a beekeeper on a ranch Sarah inherited from her Grandmother. Starring Ashley Newbrough (2021)

programme.title: Love in Full Swing
programme.desc: (2020) Romance with Sarah Smyth. Becks goes home to help her best friend track down his first love. But after a number of revelations, will she be honest with her own heart?

programme.title: Senior Year: Love Never Fails
programme.desc: CJ & Marcella struggle to protect their relationship against pressure from family, faith and friends when a devastating discovery upends their lives.

programme.title: The Light Between Oceans
programme.desc: Based on the bestselling novel by M.L. Stedman and from acclaimed director Derek Cianfrance (The Place Beyond The Pines), The Light Between Oceans is a beautiful and heart-breaking reminder of the infinite power of love and the lengths that we'll go to in order to protect it.

programme.title: A Week in Paradise
programme.desc: A film star with a newly broken heart jets off to paradise in the Caribbean, where she finds not only herself again, but maybe even a new love.

programme.title: Christmas Wish
programme.desc: When Paula chose Gary over Nick, 15 years later she'd be married, with tons of debt. At Christmas, when Nick reappears, now a rich, successful art broker. A little Christmas magic and she is transported to the life with Nick.

programme.title: Sound Of Christmas
programme.desc: Whilst trying to reignite his daughter's passion for Christmas, Brad, falls in love with piano teacher, Lizzie. However, their romance is threatened by Brad's business interests.

programme.title: Christmas Wedding Runaway
programme.desc: A runaway bride does some soul-searching when she's trapped in a snowed-in cabin with her grandmother and an old flame at Christmas.

programme.title: Christmas in Mississippi
programme.desc: Photographer Holly returns to Gulfport, Mississippi for Christmas. Their traditional holiday light show has been revived again since a hurricane struck five years earlier. She is shocked to learn the festival is run by her high school sweetheart, Mike.

programme.title: Dognapped: Hound for the Holidays
programme.desc: An assistant of an influencer and a charming vet bond to find a missy puppy before Christmas.

programme.title: The Christmas Dragon
programme.desc: Ayden, an orphan in Medieval Europe who lost her parents to a dragon, receives a magic crystal from a dying elf to bring back Christmas from becoming a fading memory. She and the other orphans alongside wayward adult Airk must go to the North to meet Father Christmas.

programme.title: Enchanted Christmas
programme.desc: When she left Utah as a young widow, Laura Trudeau left behind her father, her love of dance -- and an old heartbreak. Now, she must return home to spearhead the renovation of a derelict hotel, which must be restored in time for a Christmas Eve benefit dance performance. But Laura is shocked to learn that her old love, Ricardo Archuleta, the boy who jilted her for a professional dance career, is the star of the dance benefit. And when his dance partner Taylor walks out on the show for an out-of-town audition, Laura has to step in for her, reawakening her love of the dance, not to mention her old feelings for Ricardo -- a potent combination that has her head spinning.

programme.title: Tails of Christmas
programme.desc: A military veteran searches for purpose in his life after an injury cut his career short. He finds it in a kind woman who runs an animal shelter. As they work together to find animals homes during the Christmas adoption season, they develop feelings for each other, and help each other with the challenges each faces.

programme.title: Christmas with a View
programme.desc: Secret aspirations between a failed restaurateur and a celebrity chef threaten their blossoming Christmas romance.

programme.title: Rosemont
programme.desc: Caught in a blizzard five days before Christmas, pregnant 23-year-old Lisa, and her new friend Brad, a professional snowboarder, take shelter at The Rosemont. A once great winter resort, The Rosemont has seen better days. After losing her daughter and granddaughter, the cantankerous owner Josephine has let it fall into disrepair. But now, stranded by the blizzard, with Lisa giving birth, everyone comes together to provide what they all need most – a family.

programme.title: Snowed Inn Christmas
programme.desc: Jenna Hudson and Kevin Jenner are polar opposites.

programme.title: Heaven Sent
programme.desc: Billy & Maire near 9-year marriage end: Romantic artist and businesswoman.

programme.title: The Christmas Trap
programme.desc: Couple on brink of divorce stuck in elevator on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Last Chance for Christmas
programme.desc: Santa's handsome but beleaguered stable master John must rush off to Alaska.

programme.title: Snowed Inn Christmas
programme.desc: Jenna Hudson and Kevin Jenner are polar opposites.

programme.title: Fatal Memories
programme.desc: Psychological thriller. A woman tries to help her sister remember the events surrounding the fatal stabbing of their mother.

programme.title: Cheer for Your Life
programme.desc: A high schooler faces a brutal cheer initiation. When things turn deadly and she disappears, her mom must act.

programme.title: The Love Club: Lauren
programme.desc: Lauren faces divorce papers but has a feeling that it's not quite over, so she asks the Love Club for help.

programme.title: Christmas Cupcakes
programme.desc: When their family bakery may have to close its doors right before Christmas, rival sisters Kim and Gina must team up to win a national baking competition, save the family business, and perhaps even discover a bigger prize than they hoped.

programme.title: A Street Cat Named Bob
programme.desc: The true feel good story of how a busker had his life transformed when he met a stray ginger cat.

programme.title: A League of Their Own (1992)
programme.desc: Daring female athletes win over a skeptical public and lead their team to victory in the WWII-era women's baseball league.

programme.title: Call Me Claus
programme.desc: When Lucy Cullins (Goldberg), hires an actor named Nick to play Santa Claus for a TV network, she gets more than she bargained for. Nick really is Santa Claus, and he faces mandatory retirement after 200 years on the job. Nick must find his replacement by Christmas Eve or the world will face dire consequences.

programme.title: Man Who Cried for Revenge
programme.desc: Davy Flanagan, a former Union officer who was part of an attempt to break out of a Confederate prison camp during the Civil War and suffered a blow to the head that left him with amnesia. Then a bounty hunter shows up to collect a bounty on his head as a deserter.

programme.title: Mackenzie's Raiders EP21-24
programme.desc: Colonel Mackenzie, commander of the 4th Cavalry Regiment at Fort Clark near Brackettville in Kinney County in southwest Texas during the 1870s, receives secret orders from President Ulysses S. Grant and Secretary of War William W. Belknap to stop bandits from crossing the Rio Grande into the United States, or from returning to Mexico.

programme.title: The Cariboo Trail
programme.desc: Montanans Jim Redfern and Mike Evans head into Canada's British Columbia via the Cariboo Trail intent to raise cattle and dig for gold but find trouble instead.

programme.title: Death on High Mountain
programme.desc: A major robbery spirals out of control when two young men cross paths with ruthless Mexican bandits and a corrupt businessman—both desperate to reclaim the stolen loot. Caught in a deadly chase, the youths face danger, betrayal, and the fight for survival.

programme.title: Make Mine Mink
programme.desc: A group of people lead by Major Rayne (Terry Thomas), hatch a plan to steal fur coats, sell them and give the money to charity. As a group, however, they are not particularly experienced in such matters.

programme.title: It's Not Cricket
programme.desc: Major Bright and Captain Early are planning to capture a fugitive Nazi who has stolen the famous Rothstein diamond and hidden it in a hollow cricket ball. As Bright and Early search for the Nazi, will they realise they have the valuable cricket ball?

programme.title: Conspiracy of Hearts
programme.desc: During World War Two, Italian nuns are caught helping children escape from German troops.

programme.title: The Naked Truth
programme.desc: Nigel Dennis is the suave publisher of the scandal magazine The Naked Truth. He is attempting to blackmail several well-known people. They in turn group together and plan his removal.

programme.title: UPSTAIRS AND DOWNSTAIRS
programme.desc: An excellent example of war-time propaganda film-making, combining documentary with scripted performances. Depicts a Germany under the grip of mass-hysteria led by Hitler, in contrast to the rural peace of England and the dignity of its inhabitants.

programme.title: 200 Pounds Beauty
programme.desc: A talented but obese girl, who ghost-sings for a not-so-talented pop star, undergoes extensive plastic surgery to become a slender beauty with a new identity.

programme.title: Springtime
programme.desc: A trumpet sound that will echo through your heart.

programme.title: DAEMUGA: The Great Shaman Song
programme.desc: Sin-nam, Chung-dam, Sung-joon battle their skills to seize the redevelopment district and compete to be the best shaman.

programme.title: Once in a summer
programme.desc: Su-jin, a writer of the TV program, go searching for ‘SEO Jung-in', the first love of professor YOON Seok-young.

programme.title: Hot Young Bloods
programme.desc: In the '80s heartthrob Joong-gil ignores Young-sook while newcomer So-hee becomes her rival in love.

programme.title: Iris: New Generation
programme.desc: During peace talks a North Korean diplomat is killed sparking a hunt as NSS faces moles and terrorism.

programme.title: You Are My Sunshine
programme.desc: Suk-jung's devotion to Eun-ha leads him to search for her after her past and HIV force her to leave him.

programme.title: Donovan's Echo
programme.desc: Donovan Matheson is a man trapped in the past. Once an esteemed physicist, he worked on the Manhattan Project but in the years that followed, he became engulfed in regret, which soon turned into an obsession with finding a way to use his work to do good.

programme.title: The Arrival
programme.desc: Radio astronomer Zane Zaminsky (Charlie Sheen) believes he's picked up a cosmic noise that signals extraterrestrial intelligence. His desperate search for answers leads him to Mexico and a mysterious power plant, where is arrested for the murder of a scientist.

programme.title: Native
programme.desc: A signal from the other side of the universe is received by a hive-like society. Two scientists, Cane and Eva, are chosen to leave home and journey many light years to find and colonise the distant world that sent this transmission.

programme.title: Earth to Echo
programme.desc: Tuck, Munch and Alex are a trio of inseparable friends who long for adventure. One day the boys find a cryptic signal on their phones and convinced that it is part of something bigger they set out on a quest to find the source.

programme.title: A Family For The Holidays
programme.desc: Sequel to 'Finding Father Christmas'. Miranda is exited to return to Vermont and spend Christmas with Ian and her long-lost family. But will a chance meeting threaten her future happiness? (2017)

programme.title: Christmas on 5th Avenue
programme.desc: (2021) Christmas romance with Kathryn Davis. Christmas concierge Eva Jordan loves bringing festive joy to her clients. However, reclusive crime writer Lucas Blade might be her biggest challenge yet...

programme.title: A Kiss For Christmas
programme.desc: (2011) Festive romance with Elisabeth Röhm. Filled with Christmas spirit, a woman shares a spontaneous kiss with a handsome stranger in a lift, only to discover he's her demanding manager's boyfriend.

programme.title: Christmas On Ice
programme.desc: A former figure skater and a former hockey player work together to stop the mayor from closing the local skating rink. Starring Abigail Klein (2020)

programme.title: Holiday Hotline
programme.desc: (2023) Phone-omenal romance with Emily Tennant. There's love on the line when a woman working at a switchboard connects with a charming anonymous caller - but she doesn't realise they've already met.

programme.title: Waiting for you
programme.desc: Paul (Morgan) investigates his late father's increasingly disturbing past and becomes suspicious of the mysterious, melancholic, and possibly dangerous Madeleine (Ardant).

programme.title: Breaking Infinity
programme.desc: A scientific researcher who has become unstuck in time must figure out what happened to him and stop the coming end of the world.

programme.title: The Double
programme.desc: An edge-of-your-seat espionage thriller, starring Richard Gere and Topher Grace as ex-CIA and FBI agents, trying to find the killer of a US senator, which bears the hallmark of an infamous Soviet assassin, thought to be dead.

programme.title: Runaway Jury
programme.desc: Set in New Orleans, this is the story of a mysterious man, Nick Easter. Nick gets himself not only on the jury of a landmark case against a gun manufacturer, but as the foreman, in an attempt to influence the other jury members to vote a certain way.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In the worlds before Monkey, primal chaos reigned. Heaven sought order. Tathagata Buddha, the Father Buddha said, "With our thoughts, we make the world." From the New World came a stone monkey. The nature of Monkey was irrepressible!

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In the worlds before Monkey, primal chaos reigned. Heaven sought order. Tathagata Buddha, the Father Buddha said, "With our thoughts, we make the world." From the New World came a stone monkey. The nature of Monkey was irrepressible!

programme.title: Joyeux Noel (Merry Christmas)
programme.desc: Based on the true story of three armies in the bloody trenches of World War I - and the miraculous Christmas Eve truce they unexpectedly forge.

programme.title: Angels & Demons
programme.desc: The team behind the global phenomenon The Da Vinci Code returns for the highly anticipated Angels & Demons, based upon the bestselling novel by Dan Brown. Tom Hanks reprises his role as Harvard symbologist Robert Langdon, who once again finds that forces with ancient roots are willing to stop at nothing, even murder, to advance their goals

programme.title: The 6th Day
programme.desc: Human cloning technology has fallen into destructive, corrupt hands but one man refuses to be a pawn in the deadly conspiracy.

programme.title: The 6th Day
programme.desc: Human cloning technology has fallen into destructive, corrupt hands but one man refuses to be a pawn in the deadly conspiracy.

programme.title: Warrior
programme.desc: The youngest son (Hardy) of an alcoholic former boxer (Nolte) returns home, where he's trained by his father for competition in a mixed martial arts tournament -- a path that puts the fighter on a collision corner with his older brother (Edgerton).

programme.title: Diana
programme.desc: Celebrated and adored by millions, she was the Queen of people's hearts, yet the bittersweet story of the last man to truly capture hers has never before. In a story that until now has remained untold, Diana introduces a time in the Princess's life that was important in shaping her final years...

programme.title: The Good Lie
programme.desc: Orphaned during the Sudanese Civil War, a group of young refugees are given the opportunity to leave their camp and resettle in America.

programme.title: The Legend Of Hercules
programme.desc: In the epic origin story the legend of Hercules, a half-god, half-man blessed with extraordinary streng. Betrayed by his stepfather, the king, and exiled and sold into slavery because of a forbidden love, Hercules must use his formidable powers.

programme.title: Abduction
programme.desc: A thriller centered on a young man who sets out to uncover the truth about his life after finding his baby photo on a missing persons website.

programme.title: Snitch
programme.desc: In the fast-paced action thriller SNITCH, Dwayne Johnson stars as a father whose teenage son is wrongly accused of a drug distribution crime and is looking at a mandatory minimum prison sentence of 10 years.

programme.title: Iron Fury
programme.desc: In 1944, a young lieutenant leads a courageous group of Russian soldiers in a German POW camp, plotting a daring escape from captivity in a half-dest
